title: Afgooye Heat Wave
lead: Afgooye is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.40. The city's temperature has reached critical levels, posing significant risks to its residents.
body:
The current heat wave in Afgooye has resulted in a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions. 
 The city's Cooling Degree Days (CDD) has reached 10.9 GG, while the Heating Degree Days (HDD) remains at 0.0 GG, highlighting the severity of the heat wave. 
 With an humidity level of 67% and wind speed of 26.0 km/h, the heat index is expected to remain high, exacerbating the situation.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures to ensure public safety.
